scripts.sync-keys: cp -Rf pkgs/contract/src/managed/counter/keys pkgs/app/public/managed/counter/ && cp -Rf pkgs/contract/src/managed/counter/zkir pkgs/app/public/managed/counter/
scripts.build: bun run --cwd pkgs/contract build && bun run sync-keys && bun run --cwd pkgs/cli build && bun run --cwd pkgs/app build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd pkgs/app build && bun run --cwd pkgs/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd pkgs/contract build
